title: Introducing InvisiClip™. A hidden fastener system, made in the USA.
excerpt: POM clips on stainless rails. Boards drop in from above. No screws on the deck surface, built to the GRAD® system spec, made in Linden, NJ.
heroAlt: Walnut PVC deck board hovering above two InvisiClip hidden fasteners on an aluminum rail, grooves aligned with the clips
author: American Pro
